Appearance

📊 ReportForgeCrystal Reports-Compatible Report Designer

Visual drag-and-drop designer + REST API for generating professional reports from JSON layouts — no build step required.

🚀 Get Started
🏗️ Architecture
🔌 API Reference
🖥️

Visual Designer

Browser-based drag-and-drop designer with Crystal Reports look and feel — section labels, property grid, format toolbar, and full menu bar.

⚡

ES Module Architecture

52 focused modules across 5 layers (Core → UX → Classic → Modules → V4). No bundler, no build step — just open in a browser.

📐

Modern CSS

CSS @layer cascade, container queries, logical properties, fluid clamp() sizing, focus-visible interactions, and a complete design token system.

🔄

Smart Render Pipeline

Layer invalidation system (elements / selection / sections). Non-destructive inspector diffs — only rebuilds when the element actually changes.

📊

Full Report Elements

Text, fields, lines, rectangles, images, charts, tables, barcodes, rich text, subreports, crosstabs, and maps.

🔌

REST API

POST /designer-preview with a layout JSON + data and receive rendered HTML ready for PDF conversion via headless Chrome or wkhtmltopdf.

ReportForge — Crystal Reports-Compatible Designer
